problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region may resolve How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: In vitro cell culture assay with 18 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
